page_content: AREC891 Introduction to Prospectus Development (1 Credit) Critical evaluation of research, prospectus topic exploration including literature review, data identiﬁcation, model development, and related presentations. Required of all second-year Ph.D. students. Prerequisite: Completion of the ﬁrst year of graduate study in AREC. Credit Only Granted for: AREC 869K or AREC 891. Formerly: AREC869K.
